message:
Command `
# Nothing new in the pipe. DRT is computing without printing (between 70% and 80% milestones).
# This is expected - DRT computes routing then prints milestones when crossing 10% thresholds.
# Let me verify DRT isn't blocked by checking the syscall

ORPID=1101105
SC=$(cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c5)
T1=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
sleep 5
T2=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "Syscall=$SC CPU: $T1 → $T2 (delta=$(echo "$T2 $T1" | awk '{split($1,a,":"); split($2,b,":"); t1=a[1]*3600+a[2]*60+a[3]; t2=b[1]*3600+b[2]*60+b[3]; print t1-t2}'))"
` executed with exit code 0.
